distillationMethod.method: book2skill RIA-TV++ adapted for a single executable Codex skill
distillationMethod.stage0: Adler-style whole-book understanding: structure, interpretation, critique, and application captured in BOOK_OVERVIEW.md.
distillationMethod.stage1: Candidate extraction across frameworks, principles, examples, counterexamples, and glossary files in candidates/.
distillationMethod.stage1_5: Triple verification: retained units needed cross-source support, predictive use on new modeling tasks, and non-trivial distinctiveness.
distillationMethod.stage2: RIA++ construction: reading anchors, interpretation, past applications, future triggers, execution workflow, and boundaries in SKILL.md.
distillationMethod.stage3: Zettelkasten links captured in INDEX.md and Related Skills.
distillationMethod.stage4: Trigger pressure tests captured in test-prompts.json.

keyConcepts: functions, mappings, operators, domain and range
graphs, labeled graphs, hypergraphs, bipartite graphs, conceptual graphs
partial orders, lattices, subtype hierarchies, meet and join
formal concept analysis and ontology refinement
runtimeDependencyPolicy: Closed skill: execute from SKILL.md; use references/source-notes.md only as local optional provenance; do not require external source folders, webpages, original books, source reports, machine-local paths, or cross-skill files.
